postData.contentHtml:
In an era increasingly defined by artificial intelligence, the unseen infrastructure that powers this revolution is becoming more critical than ever. Leading the charge in this essential buildout is Quanta Services, Inc. (NYSE:PWR), a company recently lauded by investment guru Louis Navellier as a top long-term stock pick.

Quanta Services is not just riding the wave of AI; it's actively building the tracks for it. The company specializes in providing comprehensive infrastructure solutions for utility, renewable energy, power generation, communications, pipeline, and energy industries. This includes everything from design and installation to repair and maintenance services for vital energy and load-center infrastructure. As AI data centers demand ever-increasing power and connectivity, Quanta's expertise is proving indispensable.

The company's robust performance is a testament to its strategic position. Quanta Services recently raised its 2026 profit forecast, a direct result of surging demand from large-load industries, particularly AI data centers. First-quarter revenue for 2026 soared to $7.87 billion, a significant jump from $6.23 billion in the previous year. Furthermore, adjusted earnings per share for 2026 are now projected to be between $13.55 and $14.25, comfortably exceeding analysts' average estimates.

A look at Quanta's backlog further solidifies its promising outlook. The company reported a substantial total backlog of $48.5 billion at the end of the first quarter, with a staggering $40.1 billion dedicated to its Electric segment. This segment is crucial, handling the power delivery work necessary for utilities, generators, and large-load customers as they expand their infrastructure to meet modern demands. Management projects a massive $2.4 trillion addressable market through 2030 for converging utility, generation, and large-load markets, indicating a prolonged period of growth for Quanta Services.

Social sentiment surrounding Quanta Services Inc. stock has been largely positive, reflecting investor confidence in its role in the evolving energy and infrastructure landscape. While some market fluctuations are inherent, the underlying strength of Quanta's business model and its direct correlation with the booming AI sector make it a compelling investment for the long haul.
postData.title: Quanta Services (PWR): Powering the AI Revolution and Poised for Long-Term Growth
postData.summary: Quanta Services, Inc. (PWR) is emerging as a critical player in the AI infrastructure boom, with Louis Navellier identifying it as a top long-term stock pick. The company's recent profit forecast hike and substantial backlog underscore its pivotal role in the utility buildout driven by AI data centers.
